steps.title: Identify the key detail
steps.content: The passage explicitly states: Miyazaki presents fantasy with “little backstory or explanation.” This reveals what he does NOT do with these elements.

steps.title: Match the answer to the evidence
steps.content:
Withhold captures this constraint—he withholds (refuses to provide) the details and exposition.

The other three choices all suggest providing, celebrating, combining, or inventing details, contradicting “little backstory or explanation” explicitly shown next.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
